debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i ≠ j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts:
cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
  simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  all_goals
    apply HasLaw.comp_measurable
    · apply measurable_pi_eval
    · apply Measure.map_apply
      rw [WignerMeasure]
      apply Measure.pi_eval
      split_ifs <;> aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_of_hasLaw_comp_measurable
  <;> apply MeasureTheory.pi.hasLaw_apply
  <;> simp [wignerMeasureDist]
  <;> split_ifs <;> aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
  simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply Measure.map_apply_measurableSet
  <;> try apply measurable_pi_apply
  <;> simp_all [wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]
  <;> aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply Measure.map_apply_measurableSet
  <;> apply measurable_pi_apply

have h₁ : i < j ∨ j < i := lt_or_gt_of_ne h
  cases' h₁ with hlt hgt
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n hlt
  · rw [wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n hgt

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;> simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_eval
  <;> simp [wignerMeasureDist, *]

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
  simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_eval
  <;> simp [wignerMeasureDist, *]

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_of_hasLaw_comp_piEval
  <;> simp_all [wignerMeasureDist]

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h
  case inl h_lt =>
    rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
    simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_lt]
    apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_eval
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, h_lt.ne']
  case inr h_gt =>
    rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
    simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_gt]
    apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_eval
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, h_gt.ne']

have h₁ : i < j ∨ j < i := lt_or_gt_of_ne h
  cases' h₁ with hij hij
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n hij
  · rw [wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n hij

have h₁ : i < j ∨ j < i := lt_or_gt_of_ne h
  cases' h₁ with hij hij
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n hij
  · rw [wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n hij

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply Measure.map_apply_measurableSet
  <;> aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply MeasureTheory.HasLaw.of_piEval
  <;> simp_all [wignerMeasureDist]

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
  simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_iff_integral_eq_forall
  <;> intro f hf
  <;> simp_all [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist]
  <;> rw [Measure.pi_integral_apply]
  <;> simp_all

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
  simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_of_pi_eval
  <;> simp_all [wignerMeasureDist]

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
  simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> split_ifs <;>
  simp_all [HasLaw, Measure.map_apply, WignerMeasure, Measure.pi, wignerMeasureDist]
  <;> aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply Measure.map_apply_measurableSet
  <;> apply measurable_pi_eval

have h_le_or_ge : i ≤ j ∨ j ≤ i := le_total i j
  cases h_le_or_ge with
  | inl h_le =>
    have h_lt : i < j := lt_of_le_of_ne h_le h
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n h_lt
  | inr h_ge =>
    have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne h_ge (Ne.symm h)
    have h_symm : ∀ ω, wignerMatrixMap n ω i j = wignerMatrixMap n ω j i :=
      fun ω => wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    have h_law : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) :=
      offDiagonalHasLaw' n h_gt
    exact h_law.congr_fun h_symm

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  all_goals
    apply HasLaw.of_pi
    · exact fun p => if p.val.1 = p.val.2 then ν else μ
    · aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
  simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply Measure.map_apply_measurableSet
  <;> try apply measurable_pi_apply
  <;> simp_all [wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]
  <;> aesop

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
    simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply offDiagonalHasLaw'
  <;> assumption

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n ‹_›
  · have h_symm : ∀ ω, wignerMatrixMap n ω i j = wignerMatrixMap n ω j i := by
      intro ω
      rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
      simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
      split_ifs <;> try rfl
      all_goals aesop
    rw [← h_symm]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n ‹_›

have h₁ : i < j ∨ j < i := lt_or_gt_of_ne h
  cases' h₁ with hij hij
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n hij
  · rw [wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n hij

  <;> simp [wignerMeasureDist, *]

  <;> apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_eval

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;> simp_all [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply Measure.map_apply_measurableSet
  <;> try apply measurable_pi_apply

have h_le_or_ge : i ≤ j ∨ j ≤ i := le_total i j
  cases h_le_or_ge with
  | inl h_le =>
    have h_lt : i < j := lt_of_le_of_ne h_le h
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n h_lt
  | inr h_ge =>
    have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne h_ge (Ne.symm h)
    have h_symm : ∀ ω, wignerMatrixMap n ω i j = wignerMatrixMap n ω j i :=
      fun ω => wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    have h_law : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) :=
      offDiagonalHasLaw' n h_gt
    exact h_law.congr_fun_ae (by simp [h_symm])

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h <;>
  simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  <;> apply HasLaw.congr_fun
  <;> try { aesop }
  <;> apply Measure.map_apply_measurableSet
  <;> apply measurable_pi_apply

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n ‹_›
  · have h_symm : ∀ ω, wignerMatrixMap n ω i j = wignerMatrixMap n ω j i := by
      intro ω
      rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
      simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
      split <;> try rfl
      all_goals
        split <;> try rfl
        all_goals
          omega
    rw [← h_symm]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n ‹_›
